\tzpentry{ID4711}{Kaluza-Klein Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4711 introduces Kaluza-Klein Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\left(\\Box_{(4)} + \\frac{n^2}{R_\\text{KK}^2}\\right)\\phi_n = 0\n\\end{equation}
